title: stelis hallii
intro: Stelis hallii, also known as the Hall's Stelis, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is a type of epiphyte, a plant that grows on other plants, such as trees, for support. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the Stelis hallii plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
